title: Rolson 44319 3-in-1 Staple Gun
features: Suitable for upholstery, hardboard and fabrics
Accepts 4 to 14mm standard staples, 10 to 12mm rounded staples and nails 10 - 14mm
Impact pressure adjustment and handle lock
Includes 200 x 8mm staples, 200 x 12mm U-shaped staples and 200 x 10mm nails
description: From the manufacturer About Us Rolson Tools continually look to bring them innovative products, all at the possible margins and this year is no different. To date, they have over 250 exciting and innovative products to whet their appetite, together with a host of new in store packaging and point of sale material. All designed with impact and shelf appeal. The Rolson marketing team have sought innovative ways to their existing lines. They bring product combinations that bring originality. Rolson 44319 3-in-1 Staple Gun Staple Gun Hand operated nail and staple gun suitable for many different types of fixing including upholstery, hardboard, fabrics etc. Accepts 4 to 14 mm standard staples. Suitable for 10 to 12 mm rounded staples. Also accepts nails 10 to 14 mm. Impact pressure adjustment and handle lock, also includes 600 pieces of staple.
